name: CodeNode pairs spread & z-score (KO/PEP)
description: StartNode -> OverseasStockBrokerNode -> OverseasStockHistoricalDataNode(KO@NYSE, PEP@NASDAQ, 1d) -> CodeNode(hand-rolled log-price hedge ratio via statistics.linear_regression + spread z-score entry signal, stdlib only) -> SummaryDisplayNode. Educational hand-roll reference for the PairTrading/ZScore plugins. Constant/degenerate series or <3 aligned points return status='degenerate'/'insufficient_data' with signal='flat'. dry_run-safe.
